Self-hosted vendor libraries (no third-party CDN requests — privacy + speed + robustness)

# Scripts (vendor/)
react              18.3.1
react-dom          18.3.1
canvas-confetti    1.9.3
dom-to-image-more  3.4.5

# Fonts (vendor/fonts/) — fetched from Google Fonts API, served same-origin.
# Re-fetch by running:  node scripts/fetch-fonts.mjs
# Only the weights actually used by the app are included (subsetting matters):
Oxanium            700, 800
Outfit             400, 500, 600, 700
Fraunces           300, 400
JetBrains Mono     400, 500, 600, 700
